creator: wjenkner@inode.at
text:
(In reply to Jean-Sébastien Pédron from comment #11)

> The patch you attached exists in the port already:
> https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/x11-drivers/xf86-video-ati/files/
> 
> However, we never sent it upstream, AFAIK...

I see.  But the problem is that it is not in

http://trillian.chruetertee.ch/ports/browser/branches/experimental/x11-drivers/xf86-video-ati/files

(Sorry, if you are already aware of this.)
